assertions.assertion: Lists all four signing behaviors: SignAssertion, SignResponse, SignBoth, DoNotSign
assertions.rationale: All four behaviors are listed in a table.

assertions.assertion: Recommends SignBoth for the specific requirement of signing both assertion and response
assertions.rationale: SignBoth is explicitly recommended for this use case.

assertions.assertion: Notes that SignAssertion is the default and most interoperable option
assertions.rationale: SignAssertion is noted as default and most interoperable.

assertions.assertion: Warns that DoNotSign should only be used for testing, never in production
assertions.rationale: DoNotSign is marked as testing only, never for production.

assertions.assertion: Shows how to set SigningBehavior on the SamlServiceProvider or as a default via options.Saml.DefaultSigningBehavior
assertions.rationale: Both per-SP and default configuration are shown.
